notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Jeremy Peña. Nick Gonzales scores. Oneil Cruz to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers grounds into a double play, shortstop Jared Triolo to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Taylor Trammell out at 2nd. Jake Meyers out at 1st.
